typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		ID as string,
		{RAM Server Name} as string,
		{RT Planned Activity} as string,
		{Funding Date} as string,
		{RT Decom Date} as string,
		{Normalized OS} as string,
		Environment as string,
		{Target Data Center} as string,
		{Target VM} as string,
		{Managed by Group} as string,
		{Primary Application} as string,
		{Primary Tech MGR} as string,
		CIO as string,
		{CIO Direct} as string,
		{CIO Name} as string,
		{CIO Direct Name} as string,
		{CI Status} as string,
		Workstream as string,
		{Norm Site} as string,
		{Priority Bucket} as string,
		{Application IDs} as string,
		{Current VM} as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Oseoldate as string,
		{PAA Indicator} as string,
		{PAI Indicator} as string,
		{Physical or Virtual} as string,
		{Product Name} as string,
		{RT Status} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive(Import_date = toString(currentDate())) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		PAA_Indicator as string,
		RT_Planned_Activity as string,
		CIO_Name as string,
		Workstream as string,
		RAM_Server_Name as string,
		Managed_by_Group as string,
		Oseoldate as string,
		CI_Status as string,
		Norm_Site as string,
		Target_Data_Center as string,
		Target_VM as string,
		Normalized_OS as string,
		Priority_Bucket as string,
		Application_IDs as string,
		Primary_Application as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ID as string,
		CIO_Direct_Name as string,
		RT_Status as string,
		CIO as string,
		Product_Name as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		PAI_Indicator as string,
		RT_Decom_Date as string,
		Primary_Tech_MGR as string,
		CIO_Direct as string,
		Current_VM as string,
		Environment as string,
		Physical_or_Virtual as string,
		Funding_Date as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		PAA_Indicator = {PAA Indicator},
		RT_Planned_Activity = {RT Planned Activity},
		CIO_Name = {CIO Name},
		Workstream,
		RAM_Server_Name = {RAM Server Name},
		Managed_by_Group = {Managed by Group},
		Oseoldate,
		CI_Status = {CI Status},
		Norm_Site = {Norm Site},
		Target_Data_Center = {Target Data Center},
		Target_VM = {Target VM},
		Normalized_OS = {Normalized OS},
		Priority_Bucket = {Priority Bucket},
		Application_IDs = {Application IDs},
		Primary_Application = {Primary Application},
		Import_date,
		ID,
		CIO_Direct_Name = {CIO Direct Name},
		RT_Status = {RT Status},
		CIO,
		Product_Name = {Product Name},
		Hweoldate,
		PAI_Indicator = {PAI Indicator},
		RT_Decom_Date = {RT Decom Date},
		Primary_Tech_MGR = {Primary Tech MGR},
		CIO_Direct = {CIO Direct},
		Current_VM = {Current VM},
		Environment,
		Physical_or_Virtual = {Physical or Virtual},
		Funding_Date = {Funding Date})) ~> OLEDBDestination
